Projects

Things I've built

Click a project card or the GitHub button to view the repository.

01
Weather Forecasting using Python

A weather forecasting tool built with Python using real-world datasets from Kaggle. Includes variable evaluation, data processing via Excel sheets, and an HTML/CSS frontend.

PythonHTML CSSKaggleExcel
⌥ GitHub ↗ View Repo
02
Audio to Sign Language Converter

Converts spoken audio to sign language in real time using the Web Speech API. Includes NLP text preprocessing via NLTK and a 3D animated character to display signs.

HTMLCSS JavaScriptWeb Speech APINLTK
⌥ GitHub ↗ Coming Soon
03
Tactical Lens — Sports Analysis

AI-powered football match analysis covering Premier League, La Liga, Bundesliga, Serie A & Champions League. Displays live stats, match data, and standings via sports APIs.

AISports APIs JavaScriptCSS
⌥ GitHub ↗ Coming Soon

Storage Manager

A C-based data management system for storing, retrieving, and updating records — demonstrated as a hospital management system handling patients, doctors, and tests.
